channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter, 10th July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in street. At the end of Ramillies Road, nearest to Sherwood Park Ave. W3W: thus.bigger.people

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 132, Ramillies Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Grafitti on building

item.title: Three black bags of garden waste were left, 10th July
item.description:
During the night someone has left three black bags of garden waste by the fence of 40, Shawbrooke road on the Messent road side.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shawbrooke Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car broken windows abandoned, 10th July
item.description:
This car has broken windows and has been abandoned been here for weeks and weeks Car reg DA59 HCF

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are two holes in the floor of the pavement. It looks like something has been taken up. Some with one of the holes has got wiring hanging out of it and the other hole just has a rug on top of it. This is very, very dangerous. I do have pictures, 10th July
item.description:
There are two holes in the floor. It looks like the drainage things have been taken up but they've just been left one's got a rug over it and the other one's got wires hanging out of it. This is very dangerous for children around and for people that could fall in. I do have pictures
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Milmna, 10th July
item.description:
Road filthy with litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milman Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dyne road, 10th July
item.description:
The oavement is filthy and sticky and smells outside qoodys grill on dyne road its not fit to walk on
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead badger, 10th July
item.description:
There is a dead badger on the grass next to the bridge where kids walk to and from school
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgriwn trees & vegetation blocking the pedestrian path, meaning you have to walk in the cycke path., 10th July
item.description:
This is the pathway from the bus stop on the A10 just past Enfield Crematorium going south bound towards Hoe Lane. The vegetation & trees are overgrown. You can barely walk in the pedestrian path because of the overgrown vegetation. You end up having to walk in the cycle lane but then have to continually keep checking for bikes. This is a busy footpath for parents taking children to school. If it's not sorted soon we will have to walk on the grass verge which would be very dangerous. This is the second time of reporting this issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Southbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal encampment, 10th July
item.description:
There are homeless people sleeping in tents along the verge/green of Methuen Road and whilst it is a sad indictment on this world that we have people living this way, there are now 3 shopping trolleys left on the pavement nearby them and litter along the verge. This is a problem I have noticed this week, over the last few days. We pay a lot of council tax for this area and to see the littering and abandoned trolleys especially is saddening, frustrating and a concern
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Methuen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish and garden waste needs removing, 10th July
item.description:
Northiam Street north side junction with Mare Street Dumped rubbish and garden waste needs removing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass or bottle on the pavement as you see from picture, 10th July
item.description:
Glass broken in the middle of the street in high street shoreditch. Very harmful I stepped on it almost got injury (big health & safety hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 222, Shoreditch High Street, Shoreditch, Greater London

item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Dead fox., 10th July
item.description:
Middle of pavement outside green where flats are. Rotting. Smells bad. Covered in flies.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Casino Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: There is a dead fox, 10th July
item.description:
There is a dead fox on the pavement. It’s very distressing for children going to school and for anybody to see. It’s on the pavement by the green on casino Avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Casino Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van blocking entrance/exit to alleyway, 10th July
item.description:
Van has no MOT and is blocking access to alleyway to rear of residential premises Van parks after 17.00 every day and all the time at weekends

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Hurst Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
